name: Halt
short_description: Halt is a pixelated top-down horror where players explore a nightmare world while investigating mysterious disappearances. Limited visibility and intense atmosphere make every moment of the game thrilling.
detailed_description:
Halt is a captivating pixelated horror where you play as a detective investigating strange disappearances of people during their sleep. The game immerses you in a dark world filled with nightmares and monsters, where every action you take matters for survival. In conditions of limited visibility, you’ll have to fight horrors, solve puzzles, and make choices that affect the outcome of the game.

A unique feature of the game is the lighting system: your flashlight only illuminates areas where the cursor points, enhancing the atmosphere of unease. Throughout the game, you will need to not only fight monsters but also plan your actions carefully, conserving ammunition and finding shelter, as every resource is crucial.

The pixel graphics create a tense atmosphere, and the sound design further amplifies the fear. The game leaves a lasting impression, especially if played in a dark room with headphones. If you enjoy survival horror games with detective investigation elements, Halt is definitely worth your time.
